hotel_name: Khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Điện Biên Phủ (Mường Thanh Grand Dien Bien Phu Hotel)

reviews.title: No body could be contected
reviews.text: I disappointed because no body could be contacted to solve my problem
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. I sincerely apologize for the problems you encountered while staying here. I guarantee that I will look at every point you make. If convenient, I would like to learn more about how you feel here, to better understand how to improve the service and hotel quality for you and other customers.

reviews.title: Lower standard than other Muong Thanh locations
reviews.positives: This hotel was better than others in DBP.
reviews.negatives: This hotel did not meet the standards of other Muong Thanh that I had stayed in Việt Nam. It was not as clean and the breakfast was disappointing. There was some sort of festival during my stay and all rooms were booked. We came to breakfast at 7:00 am and a lot of the dishes were already empty. The staff did not replenish these items.

reviews.title: It's really old hotel in Dien Bien
reviews.text: We booked for 2 nights but then we stayed only a night because smelly room. Facilities too old and water is too weak. We were stayed in some other Muong Thanh and it was good so we thought Muong Thanh Dien Bien is same but it's not......
reviews.response: We are grateful for your review of our hotel. Our hotel has been in operation since 2010 and is the oldest hotel among other hotels named Muong Thanh. Wish you all the best and hope to have another chance to serve you well.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Weak shower, hard matress and pillow was not good.

reviews.title: Poor hotel with negligent staff
reviews.text: Unfortunately there are not many options in Dien Bien Phu so you'll probably end up there anyway. Don't get fooled by the pictures though. The hotel is wore down and rooms definitely need some refreshing : cigarette burns on carpet, smell of old tobacco, suspicious cleaning. Staff is negligent and even mean. We were almost victims of a scam for a tour of the city we never asked for and had to argue a long time with the manager to get out of it. Language barrier does not help especially in such remote areas but they definitely tried to charge us with something we did not ask for. I had been to Muong Thanh hotel in Quy Nhon before and it was a very nice stay. This one though I would not recommend at all.
reviews.positives: Only "decent" option in town, location

reviews.title: Not good but there's not much choice in. Dien bien
reviews.negatives: It wasn't comfortable. The room was noisy as there seem to be a water pump on top floor running all day & night. Breakfast is limited for vegetarian. Wifi is like in 1990s

reviews.title: Veitnamese get charged $24 night for same room.
reviews.text: I don't like it when my business partner (Vietnamese) gets charged 1/2 what I paid for the same room. It is actually against the law in Vietnam to change the prices of hotels only because your not Vietnamese. I will probably never come back there again as it was a very over priced hotel for $45 a night with really poor breakfast. That being said I know there are only a small amount of options in DBP, but I would try another place before staying here again.
reviews.positives: Clean, wifi, centrally located

reviews.title: Really pleasant stay in a nice hotel with great staff
reviews.positives: Big comfy rooms and very helpful staff, especially Mrs Triang. Ideal base for exploring historic sites, especially Beatrice, which is walking distance. Other places need taxi but these are cheap. They sorted us a car for the day, transport to Son La and recommended a great Black Thai restaurant.
reviews.negatives: It’s a chain hotel so some may see it as charmless, but it’s the people that count and they are lovely.

reviews.title: Run-down hotel with unhelpful staff
reviews.text: Staff were either rude, incompetent, or both. Room was average with many things falling apart. Kettle was broken, clothes hanging rack fell off the wall, AC remote worked on and off, landline phone wasn’t working at all and they didn’t manage to fix it my entire stay. Do not book here.

reviews.title: Best in Town

reviews.title: Cleaning issue
reviews.text: The hotel should have to improve cleaning and hygiene. We saw mouse running in the restaurant. It’s quite terrible for 4* hotel.

reviews.title: Good Basic Hotel :- Friendly and Helfful Staff
reviews.text:
This hotel has not put its prices up for 3 years. It offers good value for Vientiane and is adequate for those just passing through. The breakfast is served from 7.30 'til 8 ish and is complementary if a little eggs and instant coffee basic.

Totally adequate for those passing through or travelling in a tightish budget, but the fittings and features are a little worn. Significantly below flash-packer standards and prices and a little above backpacker standards and rates.

I suppose it filled the gap in the market I was looking for as I passed through Vientiane, which appears to be loosing much of its charm as it appeals to a more well-heeled and bigger spending sort of visitor

reviews.title: A lot of work needed
reviews.text:
I had booked an executive suite which has a spacious bedroom and separate living room. Emerging out of the lift onto the 7th floor, I noticed that the corridor carpet was old and quite stained, however inside the room the carpet was OK. 

The furniture was all a bit tacky, but the bed was very comfortable, and the AC worked well. Wifi also was good. The TV only had Vietnamese channels, but as I didn't see a single other foreigner in the time I was in Dien Bien Phu, I guess that's not unreasonable!

The major problem I experienced was that the shower tray mastic had all worked loose, so when I took a shower water pooled all over the bathroom floor. This state of disrepair hadn't happened recently and should have been obvious to all cleaning staff.  

I decided to have dinner in the hotel restaurant, but found several of the dishes I was interested in were not available, and despite having a wine list of 12, there was absolutely no wine to be had. "We have Saigon beer" was what I was told!

This could be a much be a much better hotel, but it clearly needs new and focussed management before there will be any improvement.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

On behalf of the entire hotel team, we would like to sincerely thank you for choosing to stay with us during your recent trip, and especially for taking the time to provide such detailed and candid feedback.

We are delighted to hear that you were pleased with the spaciousness of the suite, the comfort of the bed, the air conditioning, the Wi-Fi quality, and your decision to dine at our restaurant. Your satisfaction is a great encouragement to all of us.

At the same time, we would like to extend our sincere apologies for the aspects that did not meet your expectations – from the worn and unclean hallway carpet to the hygiene and maintenance issues in the shower area. In particular, the loose silicone seals that caused water to spread across the bathroom floor are absolutely unacceptable. As you rightly pointed out, this is something that our housekeeping team should have detected and reported. We have taken this feedback seriously and passed it on to the relevant d

reviews.title: Customer has no other option! Force to accept the deal!
reviews.positives: The only “hotel” in Dien Bien Phụ, no other option! “Monopoly business”…
reviews.negatives:
Staffs behaviour! We reached early in the morning at around 6.30am, at that time there are many guests checking out, we were so tired after a long journey bus taken, so we would like to request check in earlier and willing to pay more. 

Initially the first receptionist who serving us told us our room is ready and should be no problem, but don’t know why after an eye contact with the other receptionist beside her, then situation changed! The other receptionist told us no room available for early check in but there is one room left and we need to top up another around VND1,600,000, total VND2,800,000+ for the room! 

After a quick argument with the receptionist , we insisted to keep the remaining room we booked and asked the team to inform housekeeping to clean the room immediately for us to check in early with additional charge of VND700,000 instead of VND1,600,000.

After around 15mins, the room was ready and when we entered the room, we felt that the room is not just cleaned few minutes ago, the toilet was very dry and the room has no chemicals cleaning smell at all! 

Breakfast buffet is not good! 8am stop replenishing, drinks served were tasteless, too little foods selection!

reviews.title: 4* oldy hotel. Nice people.
reviews.text:
I booked 2 nigts in this hotel. Only 10 minutes from the airport by taxi against 50 000VND.
From there you can go by foot downtown (20 minutes by foot) and visiting all the historical points if you like walking...
The room are big clean but little oldy.
The corridors carpet must be renovated.
Breakfast were inclued.
Unfotunately, there is a bar in the basement of the hotel and he noise is terrible untill midnight.
So ask to be in the northern side of the hotel, more quiet but there is a karaoké bar this side. No noise during my second night.
The hotel is at 100m from the noisy street and windows are not good isolated from the noise... But still quiet in the night.
All the people of this are helpfull and doing their job very well.
I would like to thanks Thio : this lady help me a lot for booking my return flight, for calling a taxi i forget my bag inside and for the touristic informations she gave me...
Thanks a lot Thio.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The breakfast is not very rich, there are quite few vegetables, and vegetarian dishes should be added. The room is clean, well-equipped, the staff are good, it is close to the center but a bit far if going to the village for leisure activities.
reviews.response:
Dear Quý khách,
Cảm ơn chị đã tin tưởng và lựa chọn Khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Điện Biên Phủ. Chúng em xin được cảm ơn chị đã bớt chút thời gian để đánh giá về dịch vụ của khách sạn. 
Chúng em trân quý phản hồi và đánh giá của chị về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.
Khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Điện Biên Phủ nằm ở vị trí trung tâm thành phố Điện Biên Phủ, cách các địa điểm di tích khoảng 3 - 4 km. Và cách các địa điểm bản làng dân tộc Thái tuỳ địa điểm cách khoảng 5 - 10km do tính quy hoạch của thành phố và truyền thống định cư của dân tộc Thái. Ngoài ra, buffet ăn sáng của khách sạn có hơn 30 món ăn & đồ uống thiên về ẩm thực châu Á. Tuy nhiên món ăn cho khách ăn chay chưa được đa dạng. Chúng em xin cảm ơn những góp ý của chị và sẽ lưu ý thêm về vấn đề này.
Rất mong lại được đón tiếp chị cùng gia đình tại khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Điện Biên Phủ trong thời gian tới.
Dũng (Mr) - Giám đốc Khách sạn

reviews.text: As good as it gets in DB. Being the first Muong Thanh, it is showing its age. Breakfast is basic but it has sugar cane! Server at breakfast young man named Xuan is the most helpful and hospitable. Serving with the biggest smile! He deserves a promotion!

reviews.title: Dragons in the pool?!
reviews.text: Very spacious and nicely appointed room with a big bath and good views over some of the town. Restaurant was very well patronized by Vietnamese groups and the service was awesome. Wouldve been nice to have had a cover thrown over the  but a minor thing.
reviews.positives: Restaurant and bedroom size

reviews.title: Comfortble hotel offering good value for money
reviews.text:
Muong Thanh Hotel is conveniently located around 15 minutes of walking distance from the center of Dien Bien City.
The rooms are spacious, clean and offer everything you need. A nice pool area with a large swimming pool offers a nice surrounding to relax after sightseeing. 
The restaurant offers a good selection of Vietnamese specialities. Prices for food and beverages are reasonable, not much higher than you would pay in a restaurant outside.
A good internet connection (WiFi) is available both in the rooms and in the lobby. The hotel staff was very friendly and helpful.
reviews.positives: Spacious rooms, friendly staff and nice swimming pool

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The bed is hard and causes back pain, it's a double bed but only has two pillows, no body pillow. The breakfast has few options. There was a power outage but no backup power solution to help guests deal with the heat. The staff is gentle and provides good service.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Khách sạn chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian để chia sẻ những góp ý quý báu sau kỳ nghỉ. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với thái độ phục vụ nhẹ nhàng, tận tình của đội ngũ nhân viên. Sự công nhận từ Quý khách là nguồn động lực lớn giúp chúng tôi không ngừng nỗ lực cải thiện dịch vụ mỗi ngày.
Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý chân thành liên quan đến chất lượng gối, số lượng vật dụng trong phòng, bữa sáng và tình huống mất điện. Đây là những điểm quan trọng mà chúng tôi sẽ nhanh chóng rà soát và điều chỉnh để nâng cao trải nghiệm của khách hàng trong thời gian tới.
Chúng tôi rất trân trọng những góp ý xây dựng chân thành của Quý khách, và mong sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách trở lại trong tương lai gần – với những cải tiến tích cực hơn.
Một lần nữa, xin cảm ơn Quý khách!
Trân trọng,
Ms Quỳnh Trang- GĐ khách sạn

reviews.title: Fantastic VIP ROOM, but not value for money due to middleman.
reviews.text:
First night I normal room booked through Agoda. The I extended my stay directly at the hotel, for same price I got VIP apartments. 
Book directly by hotel, then you get better room and more friendly service. 
My experience in Vietnam 🇻🇳 is that you get the best service and prices if you book directly without “middleman” and as of today 05.02.24 I haven’t received the  cash back which Agoda promised.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/ Madam,
Thank you so much for taking your valuable time to reviewing our service.
We are very pleased that you are satisfied with the quality of the hotel's VIP rooms, Your satisfaction is the motivation for us to make further efforts in improving service quality.
Once again, we would like to thank you and hope to welcome you back to the hotel in the future.
Best regards!
Dang Viet Dung - General Manager

reviews.title: A little bit lower grade than expected
reviews.text: After having enjoyed Muong Thanh luxury in South and Central provinces, I was surprised to find this place a bit lower grade than expected. Then I realized this is actually the original Muong Thanh and that the whole chain took its name from Dien Bien Phu's historic ethnic name. It's kind of a historic landmark then. But it's really starting to show its age.

reviews.title: Fabulous Hotel, very helpful staff
reviews.text:
Arriving at this Hotel, was a little bit daunting, as you come up the driveway, you are confronted with these life size statues of animals etc. Lovely big pool. Once you are inside,its a different story. The Hotel is huge, very spacious, and beautiful sprays of fresh flowers everywhere. The staff are helpful and can grasp the english language. The Manager was fantastic. He would go out of his way to help you with any query you may have.
The rooms were large, as were the bathrooms. Bar fridge restocked everyday, and linen changed everyday.Restaurant was massive, and not very well used. Breakfast was adequate. There was a chef there to cook your eggs to your liking.
Would definitely recommend you give it a go. Would go back again.
reviews.positives: Large rooms  and well equipped. Great air conditioner

reviews.title: Central location, close to the airport, convenient transportation.
reviews.text: MƯỜNG THANH grand hotel is centrally located, making it very convenient for travel. It takes only about 5 minutes from Điện Biên Phủ Airport (DIN) to reach the hotel. This location is also quite close to historical landmarks, making it very suitable for families with elderly members or children when traveling to Điện Biên. The hotel space is clean, quiet, and the food and drink are simple yet very affordable. The staff is also very enthusiastic and friendly. It is reasonable for family or corporate travel. I am quite satisfied with the duration of my stay here.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Visiting Dien Bien at the end of May.
reviews.text: My family has a trip to the Northeast for 3 days and 2 nights. I chose Mường Thanh hotel to stay, and by chance, I contacted my friend Tường Xuân at Mường Thanh hotel. She is very nice and helped my family throughout the trip, showing us places to eat, go to Hue Pe hot springs, and tourist spots in the Northeast. Par contre les prestations du spa sont remarquables avec menu à la carte si supplément .

Le restaurant est assez bien , mais la carte est mal expliquée.

reviews.title: Piscine, bon restaurant
reviews.text:
Piscine très appréciée surtout par forte chaleur mais envahie par les cours de natation locaux.
Chambres spacieuses mais d'une  propreté limite au niveau des sols et surtout avec une forte odeur de fumée.
Le personnel est agréable.
Le restaurant est varié et pas cher.
Le petit déjeuner est copieux et varié ( occidental et local)
L'hôtel est excentré par rapport aux sites historiques.
reviews.positives: Piscine. Bon restaurant varié

reviews.title: Hôtel standard excentré. Pb Karaoké et congrès
reviews.text: Hotel assez excentré qui accueille les congrès et réunions divers. Plutôt bien tenu, mais assez cher pour ce qu'il est. Le karaoké et les animations lors de congrès et réunions s'entendent de bien des chambres. Petit déjeuner médiocre.
reviews.positives: Personnel aidant

reviews.title: bien placé mais usé
reviews.text: L'hôtel est suffisamment près du centre pour tout visiter à pied. en revanche, la chambre (immense) est vieille, la moquette pleine de trous de cigarettes et l'ensemble sent le tabac. restaurant ok.
reviews.positives: emplacement et petit dej.

reviews.title: Hôtel à 5 minutes du centre
reviews.text: Très grandes chambres et internet WIFI gratuit. Belle piscine, tennis mais évitez les chambres du côté de la discothèque karaoké!
reviews.positives: Très grandes chambres

reviews.title: Avertie is average
reviews.text: One of the first Muong Thanh built, so need obviously a rénovation. Bathroom have just bath, showers are more easy nowadays, room is clean, A/C is fine, no safe which is un usual for a 4 star. Breakfast is typically for vietnamese taste.

reviews.title: Hotel provincial haut de gamme
reviews.text: Courts séjour historique (24h) sur les traces de la bataille de Dien Bien Phu.
reviews.positives: Confort et taille des chambres

reviews.title: hotel centre ville
reviews.text: Hôtel trés bien situé , 15 mn à pieds du marché ,petit déjeuner trés varié.
reviews.positives: accueil, chambres spacieuses et calmes,grande salle de bain,

reviews.title: Lieu historique
reviews.text: Très bien pour ceux qui s'intéressent à l'histoire. La ville en elle même a peu d'intérêt. Une visite de 2/3 jours Maxi.

reviews.title: hotel agréable, bien situé et avec un bon restaura
reviews.text:
Dans une rue passante de Dien Bien.

Animation le soir avec night-club techno et le jour avec un salon de massage accueillant

Hotel calm et bien insonorisé.

demander une chambre au 5éme étage.


la reception est efficace.

Guide parlant bien français et connaissant bien l'histoire de la bataille de DBP pour 35-40 US$/ jour: ninhdbptravel78@gmail.com  indispensable pour visiter les sites de 1953-1954.
reviews.positives: accueil, chambres, taille du lit

reviews.title: Tres bien a Dien Bien
reviews.text: nous avons séjourné dans cet hotel et également au him lam. him lam est beaucoup moins cher, il est excentré et le service bien que très sympathique et accueillant, reste limité. le muong thanh se rapproche des hotels internationaux. les chambres sont très grandes et très propres. le petit déjeuner est de caractère viet (pho, banh cuong). le restaurant sert de très bons plats à des prix très abordables. le muong thanh n'est pas vraiment en centre ville, l'aller retour au marché se pratique facilement en taxi. il nous semble que c'est un hotel sans surprise. le him lam est plus spartiate mais il reste acceptable.
reviews.positives: Bon services et assez bien situé

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.text: Bon hôtel, un peu vétuste, les chambres sont spacieuses, la literie à revoir, le petit dej semble sympa mais avant 8:00, sinon apres il y a moins de choix et pas de réassort. La piscine est sympa mais dans son jus, pas de transat, 2 bancs en béton dont un effrité au risque de se blesser. Rien à redire sur le service, le personnel est au petit soin avec vous, dans l’ensemble reste un bon rapport qualité prix

reviews.title: Wohl das einzig brauchbare Hotel in Dien Bien Phu
reviews.text: Das ist wohl das einzig brauchbare Hotel in Dien Bien Phu, daher ist der Ostblockcharme den das Hotel verstroemt ertraeglich. Der Fruehstuecksal hat den Charme einer Bahnhofshalle, das Fruehstueck ist katastrophal. Das Zimmer war relativ sauber ( haben allerdings vorsichtshalber nicht unters Bett oder in den ca. 10 cm Spalt zwischen Badewanne und Wand geschaut, in den das Wasser zwangslaufig beim Duschen reingetropft ist). Der Teppich war allerdings total verdreckt, hat sich aber noch nicht von selbst bewegt. Vielleicht wird der ja mal irgendwann erneuert oder laeuft von selbst weg. Personal mit rudimentaeren Englischkenntnissen anzutreffen gleicht einem Hauptgewinn. Trotzdem die beste Wahl um Dien Bien Phu zu ueberleben!
reviews.positives: relativ schoener Pool im Rahmen der Gesamtumstaende

reviews.title: sozialistisches Massenhotel
reviews.text: das Personal wirkte etwas hilflos. Angesichts des sonstigen Hotelangebotes in dieser Stadt jedoch die beste Alternative.
reviews.positives: ruhige Lage, Swimmingpool, gute Betten

reviews.title: Bestes Hotel am Platz
reviews.text: Das Hotel liegt sehr zentral und man kann zu Fuß die Sehenswürdigkeiten (alles zur Schlacht 1954)erreichen.
reviews.positives: Das Restaurant im Hotel hat zwar den Charme einer "Halle" besticht aber durch eine riesige Spiesekarte  mit exotischen Gerichten. Es gibt eine nette kleine Bar am Pool und zwei nagelneue Tennisplätze

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Die Reise wurde über Agoda gebucht und auch bezahlt, trotzdem wurde mein Sohn verpflichtet beim Auschecken nochmals mein und sein Zimmer zu bezahlen, obwohl ich am Vortag ordnungsgemäß ausgecheckt hatte. Es scheint schwierig, eine Rückzahlung zu erhalten.

reviews.text:
若干古いのですが、この地で中級レベル(高級はここにはないと思います)ホテルならここだけ。
フランスとの独立戦争の激戦地や関連の博物館があり、訪れる価値がある所ですから旅行なら少しでもいいホテルに泊まりたい人には価値があります。
reviews.response:

Sales Manager

reviews.title: たどり着くまでタクシー運転手が迷った
reviews.text: 会社のベトナム人に聞くとディエンビエンフーでは一番のホテル。でも空港にいたタクシー運転手にホテル名（英語）を見せると全く違うホテルに。結局3か所目に行ったところが正解。ホテルのフロントでも英語の会話が成り立たず、書いて意思疎通、ベトナム人の発音は特別、特にベトナム北部は。
reviews.positives: 特にない。

reviews.title: 田舎のホテルとしては上出来
reviews.text: 空港からはタクシーで10分かからないので、非常に近い。街中には歩いて10分程度。距離はそれほどでもないが、日中歩くと汗をかく。朝食ビュッフェは麺を除けば冷めていて、おいしくなかったが、我慢できる程度。部屋は大きめで快適だった。
reviews.positives: 空港に近い、町中からそこそこの距離、ホテルはきれい

reviews.title: 戦跡からは少し離れていましたが、歩いて歩けない距離ではなく私には問題はありませんでした。
reviews.text:
長年の念願であった戦跡を訪ねる旅で、ホテルを起点にしっかり歩いて回られました。
ただホテル周辺には夕食場所が少なく、その点では少し不便。
でもDien Bien Phu(辺境府)の雰囲気がよく味あえました。

戦跡巡りは半日で十分でした。
reviews.positives: 見晴らしがよい。朝食もメニューが豊富。応対が親切。

reviews.title: 町一番の気持ちの良いホテル
reviews.text: 私はディエンビエンフーの町中観光とウーバー温泉に行こうと思いこのホテルを選びました。ホテルのスタッフは親身で、ベトナム語の判らない私のために、英語を介してタクシードライバーと料金交渉をしてくれました。もっとも、わたしが選んでいたのはＶＩＰルームだったようで、最初は通常の部屋に案内され、少し経ってからそちらに案内されました。お部屋はテレビが２台あり、ソファやジャグジー風呂なだ高級感あふれていました。サービスの果物は梨、林檎、ザクロとありましたが、ザクロが一番おいしいです。マッサージが併設されており、個室タイプなので人目が気にならないのも評価できます。朝食も種類があり、楽しめます。
reviews.positives: スタッフの対応、朝食、部屋設備

reviews.title: 별로에요....
reviews.text:
외국인은 내국인에 비해서 가격을 두배 더 받더군요..
서비스랑 똑같은데..
오토바이 랜트를 하려는데 다른 지역보다 3배이상 비싸게 부르는 호텔이라 바로 취소하고 길거리에서 빌렸습니다.

가격도 비싸고 서비스도 별로.....

디엔비엔푸는 다시 가고 싶지 않아요..
완전 외국인은 봉으로 아는 지역이다는 인상...

reviews.title: 공항의 접근성이 좋고, 가격대비 깔끔한 호텔

직원들이 친절함. 방은 가격대비 깨끗한 편이었으나, 내 방의 경우 침대 시트에 벌레를 누가 쳐서 죽였는데 베게 커버에 벌레가 맞은 흔적과 벌레가 침대시트에 떨어져 있었으나 그대로 였음. 그냥 대충 치우고 잤지만 첫인상이 좋진 않았음.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Chuyến bay của tôi bị huỷ vì lý do thời tiết xấu tại Điện Biên. Hãng bay hoàn tiền vé, còn khách sạn ko hoàn 1 xu nào.
Vẫn biết rằng việc thoả thuận trả tiền trước có khách sạn hoàn toàn có quyền ko hỗ trợ khách hàng đối với các sp giá rẻ. Nhưng với sp giá cao( hơn 3 triệu cho 2 đêm) thì tôi nghĩ khách sạn nên hỗ trợ khách hàng 1 phần. Vì lý do thời tiết xấu máy bay ko hạ cánh đc chứ ko phải vì lý do chủ quan từ phía khách hàng.
reviews.response:
Dear Quý khách hàng,
Chân thành cám ơn bạn đã dành thời gian gởi nhận xét quý giá về khách sạn của chúng tôi. Với tất cả các đặt phòng online đều có các chính sách về huỷ phòng được thiết lập cụ thể, rõ ràng. Do đó đây là những chính sách cơ bản và quan trọng của một đặt phòng online. Thời tiết xấu và chuyến bay của quý khách bị huỷ là điều mà chúng tôi cũng không muốn xảy ra. Nhận xét của quý khách chúng tôi đảm bảo rằng chúng tôi sẽ xem xét từng điểm bạn nêu ra và làm việc cụ thể với trang đặt phòng online để có thể đưa ra được các chính sách linh động hơn dành cho khách hàng.
Một lần nữa xin cám ơn bạn đã dành thời gian để đánh giá về chỗ nghỉ của chúng tôi.
Trân trọng cảm ơn.

Khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Điện Biên Phủ trân trọng cảm ơn Quý khách đã giành thời gian để đánh giá dịch vụ của chúng tôi.

Cảm ơn nhiều.
